description: You'll look like the king of fashion in these boots from id, while the foamy footbed keeps you comfortable all day long. Pair it with distressed jeans, a casual check shirt and a tonal belt to recapture the masculine flamboyance of the Wild West. Upper Made of leatherette upper for maximum durability and style Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Lightly padded tongue and collar for a great snug fit Stitch detailing and overlay design to enhance shoe life Swayed overlay at the collar Midsole Full length EVA midsole for comfort and support Cushioned footbed for added comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant textured rubber outsole for better shock absorption Shoe care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a nubuck brush to clean the upper Do not store in direct sunlight
